reach_why: Extends known concerns about lock-in, evaluator drift, and bias, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links path dependence, recursive evaluation, ontological bias, and token contamination into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying early acceptances and evaluator stability, then measuring convergence, drift, lock-in, and grammar diversity.
explanation: Early accepted abstractions can lock recursive search into contingent, narrow world-models without a stable evaluative anchor.
